headline: Shake Shack Leans on Loyalty Program and Tech to Drive Growth
summary: Shake Shack  is rolling out its first-ever loyalty program as part of a broader technology push aimed at driving repeat visits and deeper customer engagement.  Adjusted earnings came at 37 cents a share, up from 26 cents a year earlier.

raw.headline: Shake Shack Leans on Loyalty Program and Tech to Drive Growth

headline: Starbucks to Unleash Unicorn Frappuccino at Coachella
summary: It’s “Short n’ Sweet” meets tall and sweet. This month’s Coachella Valley Music & Arts Festival is set to feature Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber—and Starbucks’s Unicorn Frappuccino. The coffee chain said Wednesday that it will officially sponsor the event, serving on site its cold brew, matcha lattes and Instagram-friendly Unicorn drinks.
